creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Sun Apr 13 01:52:21 2014
New Revision: 351171
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/351171
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r351171/

Log:
  - Update to 1.5
  - Add LICENSE
  
  PR:		ports/188341
  Submitted by:	Bartek Rutkowski <ports@robakdesign.com>

Modified:
  head/net/py-ec2-cli-tools/Makefile
  head/net/py-ec2-cli-tools/distinfo

Modified: head/net/py-ec2-cli-tools/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/py-ec2-cli-tools/Makefile	Sun Apr 13 01:42:21 2014	(r351170)
+++ head/net/py-ec2-cli-tools/Makefile	Sun Apr 13 01:52:21 2014	(r351171)
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	ec2-cli-tools
-PORTVERSION=	1.4
-PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTVERSION=	1.5
 CATEGORIES=	net python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -11,6 +10,8 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 MAINTAINER=	swills@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Helpful CLI utilities for querying and connecting to EC2 instances
 
+LICENSE=	MIT
+
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}boto>=1.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-boto \
 		bash>=0:${PORTSDIR}/shells/bash
 

Modified: head/net/py-ec2-cli-tools/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/net/py-ec2-cli-tools/distinfo	Sun Apr 13 01:42:21 2014	(r351170)
+++ head/net/py-ec2-cli-tools/distinfo	Sun Apr 13 01:52:21 2014	(r351171)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (ec2-cli-tools-1.4.tar.gz) = 67f5ee75945ba1fd5a7ed9f7b19d6e92198177b1ef979a9c956adb05bdfca6f2
-SIZE (ec2-cli-tools-1.4.tar.gz) = 5840
+SHA256 (ec2-cli-tools-1.5.tar.gz) = 9bd5d8cf71afae623f15c9050c56f9d8568d879c1695d7279081a4d961ce50a8
+SIZE (ec2-cli-tools-1.5.tar.gz) = 5949
